sections.paragraph:
verb לפטם

to fatten, gorge with, stuff, cram; mix, compound, blend

verb פוטם

be fattened, gorged with; be mixed, spiced, compounded

verb להתפטם

to fatten oneself, gorge oneself with

verb לפטם (>>פיטם)

to fatten, gorge with, stuff, cram

masculine noun פטמים

fattened animals

masculine noun פטם (>>פיטם)

knob, protuberance

masculine noun

mixed incense
